protocol_signature.eligibility_rule: correct energy target and force source; mass correctness diagnostic only

method.candidate_definition: positive-attribution features from one force graph
method.primary_gap: logit(newtons prefix) minus logit(joules prefix) on energy targets
method.screening_estimand: force-source swap delta minus matched mass-source swap delta
method.primary_success_rule: force-source mean and force-minus-mass mean are positive, with both bootstrap 95% confidence intervals wholly above zero
method.baseline_eligibility: The clean energy target must predict the joules prefix and the clean force source must predict the newtons prefix. Mass-source correctness is reported and preferred during prompt-variant selection, but does not gate eligibility.
